title: .env not in .gitignore
description: .env files not excluded from version control

title: .env committed to git
description: .env file is tracked by git and may expose secrets
remediation: Run git rm --cached .env and add to .gitignore

title: Insecure HTTP URL
description: Non-localhost HTTP URL in config or constants

title: Content-Security-Policy header missing
description: No CSP header configured in next.config.js or middleware

title: .env.example missing
description: No .env.example file to document required env vars
remediation: Create .env.example with all required var names (no values)

title: Cookie missing httpOnly flag
description: Cookie set without httpOnly:true enables XSS token theft
remediation: Add httpOnly: true to cookie options

title: Cookie missing secure flag
description: Cookie set without secure:true sent over HTTP
remediation: Add secure: true to cookie options
